markdownRemark.html:
Awesome Crystal

A curated list of awesome Crystal code and resources. Inspired by awesomestars222.8k and awesome-awesomenessstars29.4k. The goal is to have projects mostly stable and useful for the community.

Search Crystal Shards or follow announcements Crystal [ANN] for more.

Contributions are welcome. Please take a quick look at the contribution guidelines first.

Algorithms and Data structures

Tools

  • ast_helperstars26 - Helper tool to debug parser and formatter
  • crystal-basestars2 - CentOS base docker image for Crystal development
  • crystal-dash-docsetstars13 - Dash docset generator
  • public_suffixstars2 - A small library designed to make the Public Suffix List (https://publicsuffix.org/) easier to use

DevOps

  • ansible-crystalstars7 - Ansible playbook for installing crystal
  • DPPMstars105 - An easy, universal way to install and manage applications as packages (mostly Linux)

Editor Plugins

  • Acme:
    • acmecrystalstars4 - Reformats crystal code in acme
  • Atom
    • crystal-tools - Enables built in tools in Crystal compiler
    • language-crystal-actual - Crystal language support in Atom
  • Emacs
    • crystal-mode - Crystal language support for Emacs (crystal-lang-tools/emacs-crystal-modestars38)
  • Geany
    • geany-crystalstars6 - Crystal support for the Geany editor
  • Spacemacs
    • crystal-spacemacs-layerstars12 - Spacemacs contribution layer for Crystal
  • Sublime
    • sublime-crystalstars81 - Crystal syntax highlighting for sublime Text
  • TextMate
    • Crystal.tmbundlestars18 - Crystal syntax highlighting, compile, format command, snippets
  • Vim
    • vim-crystalstars379 - Vim filetype support for Crystal
    • vim-slangstars12 - Vim filetype support for Slang Templating Engine
  • Visual Studio Code
    • vscode-crystal-langstars238 - Formatter, linter and syntax highlighting for cr and ecr files

LSP Language Server Protocol Implementations

  • crystallinestars279 - Crystalline is an implementation of the Language Server Protocol written in and for the Crystal Language
  • scrystars327 - Code analysis server for Crystal implementing the Language Server Protocol

Shell plugins

  • crunstars37 - Crystal Run : shebang wrapper for Crystal
  • crystal-zshstars28 - .oh-my-zsh plugin
